TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Takimi, title = Takimi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Takimi} }

S.FORM: alang Takimi ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 87 buwan, 327 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 286 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 41 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 78%, Amis 4%, Paywan 2%, Tayan 1%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Takimi hya' ga Likau-uan. tay 'llaw na Takimi hya' ga Tuapuu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Takimi ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Takimi ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 87 buwan, 327 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 286 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 41 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 78%, Amis 4%, Paywan 2%, Tayan 1%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Takimi hya' ga Likau-uan. tay 'llaw na Takimi hya' ga Tuapuu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Takimi ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ takimi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na takimi ħjaʔ ɣa likau-uan. taj ʔllaw na takimi ħjaʔ ɣa tuapuu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ takimi ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
